errors: The ELM implementation does not explicitly contain the numeric values required by the CPG. Specifically:; No age range values (40–75 years) are present in the ELM snippet.; No LDL‑C threshold value (≥190 mg/dL) is defined.;

HbA1c threshold mismatch – the ELM implementation uses a threshold of 9 g% (9 %) for the most recent HbA1c laboratory test, whereas the CPG requires a threshold of ≥ 6.5 %. The unit in the ELM is also expressed as “g%”, which does not match the CPG’s “%” notation.
[BMI threshold mismatch: ELM uses 35 kg/m² instead of the required 25 kg/m²; Recent glucose test interval mismatch: ELM uses 1 year instead of the required 3 years]
The ELM implementation uses a 3‑month interval to determine if a recent depression screening has been performed, whereas the CPG requires a 1‑year interval.
DEXA scan interval mismatch – the ELM implementation checks for a recent DEXA scan within the past 6 months, whereas the CPG requires no DEXA scan performed within the past 2 years.
[Age upper bound (<=80) not implemented; Smoking history criteria incomplete – only active smoker checked, no 20 pack‑year requirement, no former smoker check, and no 15‑year quit window.]
